schedule.title: Choose the schedule type
schedule.description:
Choose how Medication Tracker decides whether this medication is required today.

Every day: required every calendar day.
Multiple times per day: required every day, with one dose for each due time you enter.
Specific weekdays: required only on selected weekdays.
Once per week: required on one selected weekday each week.
Cycle based: repeats active and rest blocks, for example 21 days on and 7 days off.

medication.title: Add your first medication
medication.description:
{schedule_summary}

Enter multiple due times as comma-separated HH:MM values, for example 08:00, 13:00, 20:00.

data_description.dose: The amount to take, such as 1 tablet, 10mg, or 2 puffs.
data_description.due_times: Use 24-hour HH:MM times. Multiple times create multiple dose events each required day.
data_description.weekdays: The medication is only required on the selected weekday or weekdays.
data_description.cycle_start_date: The first day of an active part of the cycle. This anchors all future on/off calculations.
data_description.cycle_on_days: How many active days in a row the medication is required.
data_description.cycle_off_days: How many rest days in a row the medication is not required before the active block starts again.
data_description.grace_period_minutes: How long after a due time the dose can remain due before it becomes missed.
data_description.icon: Optional Material Design icon, for example mdi:pill.
data_description.notes: Optional notes shown on the sensor attributes.

error.invalid_time: Enter at least one valid HH:MM due time.
error.one_weekday_required: Choose exactly one weekday for a once-per-week medication.

medication.title: Add another medication

mark_taken.name: Mark medication as taken
mark_taken.description: Mark the selected medication's next relevant due or pending dose as taken.

scheduled_for.name: Scheduled for
scheduled_for.description: Optional scheduled datetime to mark as taken. Leave empty to use the earliest unhandled due dose.

taken_at.name: Taken at
taken_at.description: Optional datetime when the dose was taken. Leave empty to use now.

source.name: Source
source.description: Optional source, such as Dashboard, Telegram, or Automation.

note.name: Note
note.description: Optional note to store with the dose event.
